stemHtml: Flight crew members who operate both helicopters and aeroplanes are limited to operations on…

options.a: only one type of helicopter but there are no limitations on aeroplane types.
options.b: only one type of aeroplane and one type of helicopter.
options.c: two types of aeroplanes and one type of helicopter.
options.d: only one type of aeroplane but there are no limitations on helicopter types.
